_about: Machine-readable CoordPy canonical-subject registry (W144). The source of truth is coordpy/subject.py; this file mirrors its embedded registry and is regenerated by `python -m coordpy.subject registry`. Programme = Context Zero; Product = CoordPy.

census.note: Only 4 orphans (2 legitimate internals + 2 superseded version-ladder tails); nothing dead is deleted.

provenance.classification_rule: Each surface lands in exactly one tier. S1 = stable (non-__experimental__) __init__ symbol / console script / schema / _internal.product / extensions, contract-test-locked. S2 = explicit-import-only but central to identity (architecture north-star lineage OR current W140..W143 load-bearing markers). S3 = benchmark/eval machinery. S4 = historical (W22..W42 dense-control + W49..W139 substrate version ladders). S5 = blocked/dead/keep-for-record (kept, not deleted). Tie-break: most-stable tier honestly met; S1 requires the contract test.

graphify_evidence.coordpy_to_multi_agent_discover_amortize: no path (W143 hub is a pure explicit-import leaf)
graphify_evidence.agents_to_shared_state_proxy: 1 hop (W48 north-star builds on the stable Agent surface)

subject.name: CoordPy
subject.one_line: CoordPy is a context-capsule runtime: every inter-role, inter-layer, inter-run artefact is a typed, content-addressed, lifecycle-bounded, budget-bounded, provenance-carrying capsule — never a raw prompt string.

capsule_contract.C1: Identity — SHA-256 content-address over (kind, payload, budget, parents).
capsule_contract.C2: Typed claim — CapsuleKind in a closed vocabulary.
capsule_contract.C3: Lifecycle — PROPOSED -> ADMITTED -> SEALED (+ optional RETIRED); illegal transitions refused.
capsule_contract.C4: Budget — CapsuleBudget enforced at admit time.
capsule_contract.C5: Provenance — parents must be in the ledger; the hash chain detects retroactive inserts.
capsule_contract.C6: Frozen — a sealed capsule's CID is fixed for all time.

programme_product_split.CoordPy: the shipped product (this SDK/CLI). Not the whole programme; not a universal agent platform.

usage.why: Run / replay / sweep / compare an AgentTeam preset. The recommended door for USING CoordPy.

orientation.why: Print the subject, the S1..S5 tier map, and run the hermetic harness. The door for UNDERSTANDING / VERIFYING CoordPy.

S1_stable_core.definition: On the released SDK/CLI public contract: a stable (non-__experimental__) symbol re-exported by coordpy/__init__.py, or one of the console scripts / on-disk schemas / _internal.product modules / extensions. Contract-test-locked.
S1_stable_core.note: team_coord additionally HOSTS __experimental__ W10..W40 decoder symbols; its stable core (TeamCoordinator, capsule_team_handoff/role_view/team_decision, audit_team_lifecycle) is the S1 team layer.

S2_canonical_experimental.definition: Explicit-import-only, but central to CoordPy's identity: on the architecture north-star lineage OR named load-bearing in the current RESEARCH_STATUS top markers (W140..W143). Ships in the wheel, flagged unstable, reachable only via explicit import.
S2_canonical_experimental.note: North-star name: 'Latent State Transition' (the next-branch architecture target, NOT the shipped product). The W140..W143 chain is the most recent load-bearing research result.

S3_benchmark_research_support.definition: Evaluation machinery: load-bearing to RESULTS, not to the product identity. Must stop presenting as central.

S4_historical_archive.definition: Kept verbatim for provenance. Explicit-import-only; never on the product front door.

families.W22..W42 dense-control / trust-adjudicat: 188 __experimental__ symbols (incl. integrated_synthesis [W41], role_invariant_synthesis [W42], eagerly imported for back-compat but flagged __experimental__).
families.W49..W139 substrate version ladders: tiny_substrate_v*, persistent_latent_v* (28), kv_bridge_v* (24), long_horizon_retention_v* (29), mergeable_latent_capsule_v* (27), deep_substrate_hybrid_v*, consensus_fallback_controller_v*, etc. (~400+ modules).

S5_blocked_dead_keep_for_record.definition: Explicitly killed or superseded; KEPT (provenance), not deleted.
members: differentiable_memory / composed_learned_memory / live_composed_* (W136-killed: random-until-trained nets / GPU-blocked, where present)
S5_blocked_dead_keep_for_record.note: Census found only 4 true orphans repo-wide (__main__ and _pretty are legitimate internals). Nothing dead is deleted in W144.
